assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 18-22 show 'git checkout TC-9005' and 'git pull', followed by line 27 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. The feature branch TC-9005 is checked out before the task branch is created.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 32: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table" --body "..."'. Line 35 further states: 'The `--base TC-9005` flag is critical -- this PR must target the feature branch TC-9005, not main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 27: 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. The task branch is TC-9205 (the task issue ID), clearly distinct from the feature branch TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 81-83: 'Read `entity/src/advisory.rs` to confirm the `status` column is no longer referenced', 'Read `migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs` to understand the exact MigrationTrait implementation pattern', 'Read `migration/src/lib.rs` to understand how migrations are registered'. All three files are explicitly referenced.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 52-60: Subject line 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' follows Conventional Commits format (type=feat, scope=migration). Footer contains 'Implements TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 9: '**Target Branch:** TC-9005'. Lines 15-16: 'This task targets a **feature branch** (TC-9005), not main. The branch operations are:'. The target branch is explicitly extracted and referenced throughout the Branch Operations section.
